titleStmt.title: SII 31.229: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 229. (A.R. No. B 305 of 1936.) POṬṬIPĀḌU, JAMMALAMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying near the dhvajastaṁbha in front of the Śiva temple in the compound of the Narasimha temple.

This record is dated in the cyclic year Tāraṇa, Mārgaśira, śu. 12. Palaeographically the inscription can be assigned to 18th century. Hence the date may corresponds to (1) November 27, Monday, 1705 A.D., (2) December 5, 1764 A.D.

Registers the grant of lands to Pedayaddulaya by the Reḍḍi and Karaṇams of Poṭṭipāḍu, with the permission of Bāla Veṅkatreḍḍi, in view of the forcible occupation of his lands by the Taṭimarri people. This is drafted by the Karaṇam Rāmadāsu with the permission of Nāgayya and Chiṁnāgaya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: The sun and a crescent are carved at the top of the
div.p:
svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1
Agunēṁṭṭi tāraṇanāma saṁva
tsara mā¨rgaśira śu 12 lu po
ttāpedayeddulayaku po
ṭṭipāṭi reḍḍikaraṇālu
yiṁcci yiccina bhūdāna dha
¨rmmaśāsanapatrika niṁnu tāṭi
marrivāru peṭṭuka pōyi
naṁdduna tīsukuṁnnaṁdu
śrībālaveṁkaṭeḍḍigāru
nyaṁ śalavuyicciri ganuka
reḍi pāpanicēnu Ê 1 . pōṭladu
vāni jarrelō tuṁmmala maḍi
ra reṁḍupōnicci Aviḍaraja
kralu 2 ki . vu . tilasarvamānya
ṁgā yistimiganuka mīru pu
trapautra pāraṁparyaṁttaṁ Ācaṁ

drā¨rkkasthāyigā Anubhaviṁ
cukunēdi .
reḍlu śidāreḍigāri nāgaya
veṁkaṭreḍigāri ciṁnnāgaya
vīrala saṁmatina karaṇaṁ rā
madāsu vrāśina dānapatraṁ
kōnēṭivrālu tirupati
vrālu
sarābu veṁkaṭa kori
ḍaḍu malicinadi
Digital edition of SII 31.229 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
